roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/3000ADV/3000ADM/3000REIN/PAJ:100 DAYS /X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR32  DAYS,/4019HALF/X:CLIENT MUST TAKE INJECTION PSYCH MEDICATIONS AS A CONDITION OF HIS PAROLE,  THE ONLY WAY THAT HE CAN BE EXCUSED FROM TAKING HISINJECTION PSYCH MEDICATIONS IS IF A DOCTOR DEEMS IT MEDICALLY AND-OR PSYCHOLOGICALLY APPROPRIATE TO STOP THE INJECTIONS,  IF THAT HAPPENS, HE MUST IMMEDIATELY COMMENCE ORAL MEDICATIONS,  POC CAN ADMINISTER THE INJECTION MEDICATIONS,/X:PAROLE REINSTATED TO:01-20-14 /X:PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE AND COMPLY WITH TREATMENT PER PAROLE AGENT,/

/CAL:PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/PDP/WIAPTR/X:THE PAROLEE ENTERS A NOT TRUE AS TO THE ALLEGATIONS AND STIPULATES TO PROBABLE CAUSE,/NB/25    CPC 4011,6 REPORT/TEXT:CRT ORDS DEFT EXAM PURS PC 4011,6/JAIL PSY/4011,6/REP: 02-20-14/CONTD: RECEIPT OF 4011,6PC REPORT AND TO SET/X:THE COURT REQUESTS INFORMATION ON MEDICAL COMPLIANCE FROM DR, GOULD,/X:THE MATTER IS CONTINUED TO SET OR DISPO,/
